name: ADT Freight Services Australia Pty Lt
message: ADT Freight Services Australia Pty LtADT Freight Services Australia Pty Ltd is a Melbourne based International Freight Forwarder & Customs Agency. We specialise in all aspects of International Import and Export, including Airfreight, Seafreight, Roll On/Roll Off and special projects cargo. We are also a licensed Section 77G Customs Depot, and Class 1.3 Quarantine Depot. We can cater to all of your Forwarding, Customs Clearance and Warehousing needs. We specialise in Motor Vehicle and Boat Transport, and can assist with all of your Customs and Quarantine requirements, including application of Free Trade Agreements and Tariff ConcessionsGeo: Australia - Leak size: 2 GB Archive - Contains: SQL
